scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && vite build && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html && mkdir -p dist/privacy dist/contact dist/terms && cp dist/index.html dist/privacy/index.html && cp dist/index.html dist/contact/index.html && cp dist/index.html dist/terms/index.html && cp dist/index.html dist/privacy.html && cp dist/index.html dist/contact.html && cp dist/index.html dist/terms.html
